title: User Review
description: A flat schema for structured 1–5 star reviews of tokenized applications or digital services. Designed for onchain attestation and offchain anchoring.

@context.description: Optional JSON-LD context URI for semantic processing.

attester.title: Attester ID
attester.description: Ethereum address or DID of the entity submitting the review.

subject.title: Service ID
subject.description: ID of the service you are reviewing.

version.title: Version
version.description: Version of the service being reviewed (e.g., app or API version).

reviewBody.title: Review
reviewBody.description: Free-form text describing your experience or feedback.

screenshotUrls.title: Screenshots
screenshotUrls.description: Optional screenshots showing the app during review.

proofs.title: Proofs
proofs.description: One or more proofs that demonstrate the reviewer used the service.

issuedAt.title: Issued Date
issuedAt.description: Timestamp (in seconds) when the review was issued. EAS provides this via attestation timestamp.
